title: Byju's is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Byju's is Hiring: Full Stack Developer (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Full Stack Developer looking for your next big career move? Byju's in Faridabad offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Byju's:
Byju's is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Design, develop and maintain scalable software applications
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP
• Work with agile methodologies including daily stand-ups and sprint planning
• Participate in code reviews and contribute to technical discussions
• Integrate third-party APIs and services
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in React
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in Rust
• Proficiency in Machine Learning
• Proficiency in Docker
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Java
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Professional development and training programs
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Faridabad, Haryana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Byju's!
